CustomField.formula: if( AA_List__c ,"TRUE",if( FLR_List__c ,"TRUE",if( GC_List__c ,"TRUE",if( ICP_List__c ,"TRUE",if( ICPMS_List__c ,"TRUE",if( IR_List__c ,"TRUE",if( TEA_List__c ,"TRUE",if( UVS_List__c ,"TRUE",if( AS_Consumables_List__c ,"TRUE",NULL)))))))))
CustomField.label: Analytical Mail List
